path: Problem: Concatenate header labels for columns that meet a row-wise flag condition into a single comma-separated list without a leading/trailing delimiter
Action: Build conditional text segments with REPT, concatenate them in the desired column order, then remove the leading delimiter with REPLACE

Observation: Prefixing each included label with a delimiter (", ") simplifies concatenation; a final cleanup step can reliably remove the first delimiter when at least one item is included, while returning blank when none are included
